response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, including recent TypeScript/Node.js work and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq — directly aligned with the role. Solid background in React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and Java, plus a demonstrated commitment to TDD, testing, and craftsmanship. Gaps around Nest.js, PostgreSQL, and Kotlin specifics, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with recent TS/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, own assertion library)
Broad polyglot skill set including Java, plus Docker/Kubernetes and MongoDB
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
PostgreSQL and major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) only lightly evidenced (AWS CDK once)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (pre-2018)

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack seniority and testing discipline
